name: KIMURA KOHKI Co.,Ltd.
summary: KIMURA KOHKI Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells air-conditioning equipment for commercial facilities in Japan. It offers system products, cold/hot water type products, air-cooled direct expansion type/HP type products, factory/industrial air conditioning equipment, water-cooled HP type products, and heat exchangers/related air conditioners. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
